title: Requiem Squadron
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Requiem}}
'''Requiem Squadron''' was an experimental [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defender]] starfighters group led by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], as part of [[Ysanne Isard]]'s plans to infiltrate [[Ciutric IV]] and defeat the Imperial [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] known as [[Prince-Admiral/Legends|Prince-Admiral]] [[Delak Krennel]]. The squadron was composed by the surviving pilots of the famous [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], and were piloting TIE Defenders supplied by [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Broak Vessery]] following their "deaths" at the [[Battle of Distna]].
